rationale: The proposed homestead exemption increase under Tax Code §11.13(b) has no relation to Educ. Code §12.260, which governs secondary exit-level assessment instruments for adult education charter programs.
quote: The agency, in cooperation with the advisory committee established under Section 12.254, shall adopt or develop and administer a standardized secondary exit-level assessment instrument
_note: No conflict; rule_text concerns adult education assessment instruments, unrelated to property tax homestead exemptions.
